item.title: Federal officers may have lied about shooting of migrant in Minneapolis, officials say
item.description: ICE chief Todd Lyons says the two officers were immediately placed on administrative leave.

item.title: Weston wins emphatic skeleton gold for first GB medal
item.description: Matt Weston cements his status as the best skeleton racer in the world as he makes history by winning Olympic gold in emphatic fashion in Cortina, sec...

item.title: Don Lemon pleads not guilty in Minnesota church protest case
item.description: The former CNN host and eight others have been charged for interrupting a church service to protest immigration raids in the state.

item.title: Two Britons among three dead in French Alps avalanche
item.description: The Britons had been part of a group of five people accompanied by an instructor, skiing off-piste in Val d'IsÃ¨re.

item.title: 'Intense, aggressive, entertaining' - what will Tudor bring to Spurs ?
item.description: After Igor Tudor agrees to take charge of Tottenham for the remainder of the season, BBC Sport takes a look at what supporters can expect to see from ...
